title: Embers' Delight
description: An addon for Embers and Farmer's Delight that adds strange dwarfy foodstuffs.
body:
![Embers' Delight logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/462300d98d7923e2c0a8013e7f4c1605f296bede.png)

An addon for Farmer's Delight and Embers Rekindled, adding a couple new crops made via alchemy, some funky foods, and an automatic cutting board machine, powered by Ember. Suggestions for new foods and features are welcome and encouraged.
